Notes: Standard pUC19 multiple cloning site. Embedded within lacZ-alpha for blue-white screening.
pBluescript SK/KS MCS. Flanked by T7 and T3 promoters. Wide restriction site selection.
pET vector MCS. Begins with NcoI (ATG) for N-terminal fusion. Requires T7 RNAP.
pcDNA3.1 multiple cloning site. Between CMV promoter and BGH polyA. Standard mammalian expression.
Golden Gate BsaI-based cloning site. Enables scarless ligation of multiple fragments in one pot.
Generic 30-bp homology arm for Gibson Assembly. Replace Ns with vector-specific sequence flanking insert site.
SapI (BspQI) modular cloning site for scar-free assembly. Leaves 3-nt overhangs.
pAAV multiple cloning site flanked by ITRs. For recombinant AAV production.
